title: Validate Python TX queue capacity
description: TxQueue accepts capacity <= 0, then push() calls max() on an empty entry list and raises an incidental ValueError. Validate positive capacity at construction or define zero-capacity backpressure, with boundary tests and unchanged normal behavior.
close_reason: capacity>0 validation in TxQueue.__init__ + boundary test in test_tx_queue.py; fixed misleading deadline test name/docstring; pytest 33/33, ruff/mypy clean on changed files; no behavior change for valid capacity. Fixed all discovered issues in scope.
